Hydra

The Hubble Volume Project — A joint effort to study the formation of clusters of galaxies, filaments and void-structures.

The GIF Project — A study of the formation and evolution of galaxies using semi-analytical galaxy formation models embedded in large high-resolution N-body simulations.

The Hydra Code — An adaptive technique for calculating the gravitational and hydrodynamical forces within a box.
